extensionName.message: X / Twitter Web Clipper: Save Threads & Articles to Markdown, PDF, Obsidian

extensionDescription.message: Export X (Twitter) threads, tweets, and articles to clean Markdown or PDF. Send to Obsidian or save locally. Free, no API.

tagline.message: Save threads & articles as Markdown or PDF

btn_pdf_hint.message: Generate a formatted PDF export with current settings, then choose where to save it.

btn_html_hint.message: Save as a styled, self-contained HTML file.

btn_json_hint.message: Save the raw structured document (AST) as JSON.

btn_txt_hint.message: Save as plain text with markup stripped.

btn_csv_hint.message: Save one metadata row using your selected frontmatter fields.

review_text.message: Enjoying XClipper? It's free and built with a lot of passion — a quick ★★★★★ review really helps it reach more people.

btn_batch_hint.message: Export every bookmark loaded on this page as Markdown files into one folder. Scroll the bookmarks page to load more.

fast_batch_title.message: Export your bookmarks far faster by fetching them directly through your logged-in X session (its private API) instead of rendering each page. Grants an optional X.com-only permission; nothing leaves your browser. Off by default — bookmarks only for now.

fast_batch_hint.message: Fetches bookmarks through your X session — much faster. Bookmarks only for now.

fast_batch_info.message: Exports your Bookmarks, a profile's posts, or your Likes far faster by fetching them directly through your logged-in X session (its private API) — no API key, no password, nothing leaves your browser. The step lights below show what to do first (reload the page / open one tweet). Big runs can hit X's rate limit — it stops politely so you can re-run, or use the date range to narrow the scope.

btn_batch_fast_hint.message: Fetch all your bookmarks through your X session — much faster. Expands threads & articles; stops politely if X rate-limits.

btn_batch_fast_only_bookmarks.message: Fast Batch supports bookmarks only for now — switch to the Bookmarks tab, or turn off Fast.

btn_batch_fast_profile_hint.message: Fetch this profile's own posts through your X session — much faster. Reposts are skipped.

btn_batch_fast_likes_hint.message: Fetch your liked posts through your X session — much faster. Expands threads & articles.

btn_batch_fast_no_selection.message: Selection isn't available in Fast — turn Fast off to pick tweets by hand.

btn_batch_fast_no_timeline.message: Timeline isn't available in Fast — turn Fast off to export your home feed.

batch_tab_selection_fast.message: Turn Fast off to pick tweets by hand

batch_tab_timeline_fast.message: Turn Fast off to export your home feed

fast_locked.message: An export is running — cancel or let it finish to switch modes.

fast_date_range_hint.message: Only export posts whose date is in this range — out-of-range posts are skipped without being expanded, so you reach older posts without hitting X's rate limit.

batch_reset_hint.message: Forget which posts were already exported in past runs, so the next batch exports everything loaded again.

batch_reset_queue_hint.message: Empty the gathered posts and restart collecting from where you've scrolled to — so you can begin at a specific post instead of the top.

btn_batch_open_x.message: Open x.com to batch-export bookmarks, a profile, or a selection.

btn_batch_open_bookmarks.message: Open x.com/i/bookmarks to export your bookmarks.

btn_batch_open_profile.message: Open a profile page on x.com to export its posts. Reposts are skipped.

btn_batch_profile_hint.message: Export this profile's own posts loaded on the page as Markdown files into one folder. Reposts are skipped; scroll to load more.

btn_batch_likes_hint.message: Export every liked post loaded on this page as Markdown files into one folder. Scroll your Likes page to load more.

btn_batch_open_likes.message: Open your Likes page on x.com to export the posts you have liked.

btn_batch_timeline_hint.message: Export every post loaded in your home timeline as Markdown files into one folder. Scroll to load more.

btn_batch_open_timeline.message: Open x.com/home to export the posts in your timeline.

btn_batch_select_hint.message: Pick individual tweets on the current page with checkboxes, then export the selection.

btn_batch_add_hint.message: Add the newly-loaded posts to the running batch queue.

batch_output_hint.message: Separate: one file per post. Both: per-post files plus one combined file. Combined: just one file.

batch_running.message: A batch job is already running.

btn_obsidian_hint.message:
Configure vault, subfolder, and frontmatter fields in Settings.
Use the 'Download .md' button for long threads or images.

opt_download_folder_title.message: Save Markdown and images under this subfolder inside your Downloads folder. Leave blank to save directly in Downloads.

opt_filename_template_title.message: Template for the exported filename. Placeholders: {date}, {datetime}, {handle}, {author}, {id}, {slug}, {type}. Leave blank for the default.

opt_frontmatter_help.message: Pick which entries appear in the YAML frontmatter. Selections are saved per mode.

settings_help.message: Hover over labels for more info

opt_obsidian_friendly_title.message: Emit frontmatter optimized for Obsidian: wikilink author, tags, published/created dates

opt_obsidian_vault_title.message: Used by the 'Add to Obsidian' button. Leave blank to let Obsidian pick the last-used vault.

opt_obsidian_folder_title.message: Create the note inside this subfolder of the vault (e.g. Tweets or Inbox/Tweets). Leave blank to create at the vault root.

opt_obsidian_tags_title.message: Comma-separated tags emitted in the Obsidian-friendly frontmatter. Type { to insert a placeholder. Leave empty for the default (clippings, x, {type}).

opt_save_images_title.message: Download images to a folder next to the Markdown file

opt_metadata_title.message: Add likes, reposts, views as YAML frontmatter

opt_inline_stats_title.message: Render likes, reposts, replies, bookmarks, and views as a row in the Markdown body

opt_include_reposts_title.message: When batch-exporting a profile, include reposts too. Off = the profile owner's own posts only.

opt_close_tab_title.message: Close the tab automatically after exporting from a tweet's inline button or right-click menu

opt_close_tab.message: Close the new tab after export

opt_show_inline_title.message: Add a download button next to share on each tweet's action bar

opt_inline_copies_title.message: When enabled, the inline icon on each tweet copies markdown to the clipboard instead of downloading a file

footer_hint.message: Open a tweet or article on X.com to get started

error_reload.message: Reload the page and try again.

error_specific_page.message: Open a specific tweet or article page (with /status/ in the URL).
